nws_forecast.name: Overnight
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain showers before 4am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 35. South wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.short_forecast: Partly Sunny then Scattered Rain Showers
